name: Vertiv Holdings Co.
content: Vertiv is a global leader in providing mission-critical digital infrastructure technologies and lifecycle services. The company designs, builds, and services the hardware, software, and analytics that ensure continuous operation for data centers, communication networks, and commercial/industrial facilities. Vertiv is a primary beneficiary of the AI super-cycle, providing essential power management and liquid cooling solutions that enable high-density AI computing. With a record order backlog and strategic partnerships with major chipmakers and hyperscalers, Vertiv is at the forefront of the "grid-to-chip" infrastructure transition.
